_comment: Hand-verified recruiting data rendered by recruiting.html. Edit this file to update the page — never the HTML. Live Grok-checked numbers come separately from /api/verify-recruiting and never overwrite this file. Quarantined sections (portalOut, portalWatch) are in NEEDS-VERIFICATION.md until re-verified.
portalOutNote: Outgoing-transfers table quarantined 2026-07-09 — it listed wrong-year departures (see NEEDS-VERIFICATION.md). Re-add verified 2026 outgoing moves here.
portalWatchNote: Watch list deleted 2026-07-09 — it included players now in the NFL (see NEEDS-VERIFICATION.md).

needs.context: Arch Manning is the established starter. MJ Morris (portal) provides depth. One 2027 QB is a genuine staff priority.
needs.recruiting: John Meredith III (5★, DFW) · Malachi Nelson Jr. (5★, Denton) — per public reports

needs.context: Raleek Brown and Hollywood Smothers added via portal. Noah Roberts committed in 2027. Staff well-positioned at RB.
needs.recruiting: Noah Roberts (4★, AZ) — committed. Brashard Smith (4★, TX) — trending per reports.

needs.context: Five WRs added via portal. Easton Royal (5★) anchors 2027.
needs.recruiting: Easton Royal (5★) — committed. Jaylen Mbakwe (5★, Houston) — trending per reports.

needs.context: JT Geraci and Brock Williams both committed in 2027. Michael Masunas added via portal.
needs.recruiting: Brock Williams (4★) + JT Geraci (3★) — both committed.

needs.context: Offensive tackle is the highest-priority remaining need.
needs.recruiting: Anthony Jones Jr. (4★, Cedar Hill TX) — priority target per public reports.
needs.portal: No verified OT portal additions as of June 2026.

needs.context: Jackson Cook committed at interior OL. Staff likely needs one more interior lineman.
needs.recruiting: Jackson Cook (4★, Austin TX) — committed. Additional targets per recruiting analysts.
needs.portal: No confirmed IOL portal targets as of June 2026.

needs.context: Hall and Fields committed. A third edge rusher would complete the position. Colin Simmons returns.
needs.recruiting: Cameron Hall (4★) + Derwin Fields (4★) — both committed. Elijah Griffin (5★) — monitoring.
needs.portal: No confirmed EDGE portal additions as of June 2026.

needs.context: Richard Wesley (4★) signed in 2026 is one piece of the interior rebuild.
needs.recruiting: No current 2027 DT commitment — listed as a priority need by analysts.
needs.portal: No confirmed portal additions at DT as of June 2026.

needs.recruiting: No current 2027 LB commitment — priority need per public reports.
needs.portal: Rasheem Biles (Ohio State, Sr.) added as projected immediate starter.

needs.context: Derek Williams Jr. fills one spot via portal. Blue-chip 2027 corner depth is a priority.
needs.recruiting: Devin Sanchez (5★, Houston TX) — top CB priority per public reports.
needs.portal: Derek Williams Jr. (Penn State) added as projected CB1 starter.

needs.context: Karnell James committed in 2027. Staff may add one more depending on visit season.
needs.recruiting: Karnell James (3★, Manvel TX) — committed. Caleb Carmouche (4★) — monitoring.
needs.portal: No verified safety portal activity as of June 2026.

needs.context: Jake Collett (K) and Mikey Bukauskas (P) both signed in 2026. No active special teams need.
needs.portal: No ST portal activity as of June 2026.

timeline.text: Class sits at #15 On3 / #26 247Sports with 8 publicly named commits. Summer visit season open through July 4 dead period.
Brock Williams (TE, Libertyville, IL) publicly commits to Texas. 6'5 tight end is the second TE of the cycle.
Noah Roberts (RB, Basha / Chandler, AZ) commits. 4-star back fills the early RB need.
Derwin Fields (EDGE, Brookhaven, MS) commits. Third pass rusher added alongside Cameron Hall.
Derek Williams Jr. (CB, Penn State) joins Texas via transfer portal. 2025 Big Ten All-Conference, projected CB1 starter.
Rasheem Biles (LB, Ohio State) transfers to Texas. Projected immediate starter at linebacker.
Jackson Cook (OL, Westlake / Austin, TX) commits. First interior OL of the cycle.
Cam Coleman (WR, Auburn) transfers to Texas. 5-star prospect, ranked #7 WR nationally in recruiting.
Raleek Brown (RB, Oklahoma State) and Hollywood Smothers (RB, Arizona State) both join via portal.
WR depth added via portal: Emmett Mosley V (Stanford), Sterling Berkhalter (Tennessee), Ty Boatright (Oklahoma State), Rett Andersen (Stanford).
MJ Morris (QB, NC State) joins as depth. Michael Masunas (TE, Navy) joins as projected TE starter.
Cameron Hall (DE, Mansfield Summit / Arlington, TX) commits. First defensive commit of the 2027 cycle.
Easton Royal (WR, Brother Martin / New Orleans, LA) commits. 5-star, 97.33 On3 composite.
